CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-536896, CGC-14-537478, CGC-14-538389, CGC-14-538395, CGC-14-538566, CGC-14-539993, CGC-14-541671, CGC-14-541704, CGC-14-542168, CGC-14-542233, CGC-14-542235, CGC-14-542240 WITH CASE CGC-13-536200
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alan Mayer, Esq. of Ragghianti Freitas, LLP (415-457-4082) for Plaintiffs/opposing parties Bowie, #542235; Frank, #541671, Harvey, #542168, Dittman, #542233, Pollino, #542240.
Garry J. D. Hubert, Esq. (925-680-4266) for Plaintiff/opposing party State Farm for case #536896
Cozen O'Connor, Esq. (619-234-1700) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Civil Service Employess through Court Call for case #538389.
Sally Noma, Esq. of Jang & Associates, LLP (925-937-1400)for Plaintiff/opposing party CSAA Insurance Exchange through Court Call for case #539993 and specially appearing for Plaintiff/opposing party State Farm, case #536896 and Plaintiff/opposing party State Farm for case #537478
David Ammons, Deputy City Attorney, (415-554-3954) for Defendant/moving party The City and county of San Francisco

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-536896, CGC-14-537478, CGC-14-538389, CGC-14-538395, CGC-14-538566, CGC-14-539993, CGC-14-541671, CGC-14-541704, CGC-14-542168, CGC-14-542233, CGC-14-542235, CGC-14-542240 WITH CASE CGC-13-536200 is taken under submission. Moving party to submit order in conformity with the tentative ruling and leave the portion on trial dates blank. The court will vacate the trial dates on cases that have trial dates for March, April and June. The lead case is CGC-14-536896. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Off Calendar
